_readme: Copy the 'prismalis' block into your Claude Desktop config at:
Set SCRIPT_PATH to the absolute path of mcp_server.py on your machine.
All other config (DB URL, API keys, etc.) is read from the project's .env — no duplication needed.
Optional: set PRISMALIS_USER_ID if you want get_watchlist to work without
passing user_id explicitly. Find your UUID in the users table.
